'''Blackmoon''' was the sole [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]]. As a result, "Blackmoon" was the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] code word for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was so called because it had a black surface, covered in canyons and volcanic craters, and circled Borleias in a 32-hour [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. It also had a thin [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. In the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; First)|First Battle of Borleias]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], [[Maal Lah]] installed [[dovin basal]]s on Blackmoon, using a variation of the [[Yo'gand's Core]] tactic to sweep up Borleias' space defense platforms.
